data.title: Expert Bryan Harmon provides guidance on when to DIY or seek professional help for home repairs in HelloNation.
data.description: A recent article on HelloNation discusses the dilemma faced by homeowners on whether to tackle a project themselves or seek professional help. Bryan Harmon from Ace Handyman Services in Indianapolis, Indiana, provides insights on determining the tipping point between DIY and professional assistance. The article aims to assist homeowners in making informed decisions regarding home projects.

Beijing is glowing after dark as a massive lantern show lights up the capital to welcome the Year of the Horse. Towering illuminated displays blend tradition and modern design as the city celebrates the festive season.

data.title: Lincoln Tech opens new campus in Houston, TX, providing hands-on training in four industries.
data.description: A recently established campus is now providing practical career training in four promising industries. This initiative aims to equip individuals with essential skills and knowledge required for employment in these sectors. The campus focuses on industries experiencing significant growth, such as technology, healthcare, hospitality, and finance. As part of this program, students can gain valuable experience through hands-on training and real-world scenarios. This initiative is expected to benefit a large number of individuals seeking career opportunities in these industries.

data.title: LA engineering pioneer Dave Tourjé brings Alpha Structural to Santa Barbara, offering expertise in landslide repair.
data.description: Alpha Structural, with extensive experience in landslide, foundation, and structural repair spanning several decades, is expanding its operations to Santa Barbara. This move is significant for founder Dave Tourjé as it marks a return to where his career first began. The establishment of their new office signifies a reconnection with Central Coast communities, emphasizing their commitment to providing exceptional services.

data.title: Global curved temperature monitor patch market to reach $0.9 billion by 2033 with 5.5% CAGR. North America leads market.
data.description: In the near future, there is a projected uptick in the adoption of curved temperature monitor patches due to the rising interest in continuous, non-invasive vital sign tracking and the emphasis on remote patient care. The global market for these patches is currently led by North America.

data.title: Global Carbon Accounting Software market to grow at 25.73% CAGR from 2026-2032 due to rising ESG mandates. North America holds 45% market share.
data.description: On February 16, 2026, it was reported that the Global Carbon Accounting Software Market is projected to experience a significant increase, with an estimated Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of approximately 25.73% between 2026 and 2032. North America currently holds the top position in the global market, accounting for nearly 45% of the market share. This data was derived from a market research report by MarkNtel Advisors.

data.title: Police in Wichita handle mutual domestic violence claims where both parties accuse each other of aggression, creating a complex scenario.
data.description: In Wichita, Kansas, on February 16, 2026, it was noted that cases of domestic violence are notably intricate than perceived initially. At times, both involved individuals blame each other for being the instigator, leading to a scenario often termed as a "he said, she said" situation. This highlights the complexity of such cases, where each party presents conflicting accounts of the events.

data.title: Inventors from Providence develop pain reliever NO CONTABAN CON MI ASTUCIA to instantly relieve pain for achy joints.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 16, 2026, inventors from Providence, Rhode Island discussed their creation of a new liquid pain reliever called NO CONTABAN CON MI ASTUCIA. The specially formulated product aims to provide instant relief from pain, especially targeting achy joints. The inventors highlighted the unique properties of their formula, emphasizing its potential to reduce discomfort effectively.

data.title: Summit in Zimbabwe unites stakeholders for farmer-focused data and digital initiatives to drive impact.
data.description: In Victoria Falls, Zimbabwe, on February 16, 2026, the Committee on Sustainability Assessment invites participants to the Agile Data & Digital Public Infrastructure Summit 2026. This event will bring together a diverse group including policymakers, practitioners, researchers, civil society members, private-sector representatives, and farmers from Africa. The summit aims to address sustainability challenges and opportunities in the agricultural sector through the use of data and digital technology.

data.title: Bitcoin hovers around $68K amid weak activity and negative flows. Glassnode report suggests options underestimating risk.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently consolidating in the high $60,000 range amid low participation levels. Negative capital flows are also observed. The latest analysis from Glassnode for Week 08 indicates that options trading may be undervaluing the near-term risks associated with the cryptocurrency. This suggests caution for investors and traders as they navigate the market.

data.title: Global genotyping market to hit $61.6B by 2033, with CAGR of 13.8%. Factors include rise in genetic disorders, personalized medicine, and forensic DNA analysis.
data.description: The global genotyping market is experiencing growth due to a rise in genetic disorders prevalence, a shift towards personalized medicine, and an increase in demand for forensic DNA analysis. A report by Allied Market Research published on Feb. 16, 2026, in WILMINGTON, Del., highlights these trends. The market is expected to witness significant traction with key numbers indicating a substantial increase in market size and demand for genotyping services.

data.title: Kvika banki hf. purchased 11.3 million of its shares for ISK 210.75 million in week 7 as part of a buy-back program.
data.description: During the seventh week, Kvika banki hf., referred to as "Kvika" or simply "the bank," acquired 11,300,000 of its own shares for a total purchase price of ISK 210,752,500.

data.title: Norwegian Cruise Line orders 3 new ships - 1 each for its brands (NCL, Oceania, Regent) with Fincantieri, boosting fleet till 2037.
data.description: Contracts have been secured for the acquisition of one ship each for Norwegian Cruise Line, Oceania Cruises, and Regent Seven Seas Cruises. These agreements, valid through 2037, mark a significant step in bolstering the long-term fleet expansion plans.

data.title: U.S. crypto funds lost $403M amid price weakness, as Europe and Canada saw inflows with international investors buying the dip.
data.description: As the United States withdrew from cryptocurrency funds, Europe and Canada experienced inflows as global investors purchased the dip. This trend was fueled by significant activity, with Europe reporting a $500 million influx and Canada seeing a rise of $300 million in investments.

data.title: Adversa AI launches SecureClaw, the first OWASP-aligned open-source security plugin for OpenClaw AI agents on Feb. 16, 2026.
data.description: On February 16, 2026, Adversa AI introduced SecureClaw as the initial OWASP-aligned open-source security plugin and skill for OpenClaw AI Agents. This launch was publicized over PR Newswire. A company spokesperson mentioned that hyperlinks have been included in the release.

data.title: GDT named to CRN's 2026 MSP 500 Elite 150 list for sixth year, a leading IT solutions provider.
data.description: A prominent IT solutions provider, GDT, based in Dallas, disclosed today that they have been recognized by CRN® (The Channel Company) for the year 2026. GDT has been listed on CRN's Managed Service Provider (MSP) 500 list in the distinguished Elite 150 category. This annual list by CRN® highlights top MSPs in the industry, acknowledging their achievements and services.

data.title: SEKO Logistics achieves impressive NPS of +71 globally in second half of 2025. #Logistics #BusinessWire
data.description: SCHAUMBURG, Illinois - SEKO Logistics, a leading logistics company, has achieved a remarkable global Net Promoter Score (NPS) of +71 for the second half of 2025. This impressive score indicates high customer satisfaction and loyalty towards the company's services worldwide.
